frame_analyses.description: Two graspers visible in starting position. Six rubber objects (2 purple, 2 red, 2 blue) positioned on left-side pegs. Right-side pegs are empty.
Left grasper (non-dominant) picking up blue object from bottom-left peg
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Secure grasp achieved on blue object

frame_analyses.description: Blue object being transferred from left grasper to right grasper in midair
Right grasper placing blue object on bottom-right peg. One red object visible being manipulated.
Continuing transfer sequence. Multiple objects now on right-side pegs, some objects still being transferred.
Beginning reverse direction phase - right grasper picking up object from right-side peg
Final objects being placed back on left-side pegs completing the reverse transfer
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task completion with all objects returned to starting position

confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of all transfers and placements. All 6 objects successfully transferred in both directions with no visible drops or penalties. Time measurement based on visible instrument activity.
technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with efficient movement patterns and no penalties. Total time of 66 seconds falls within expert benchmark range.
strengths: Perfect completion of bidirectional transfer sequence
improvement_suggestions: Could potentially optimize reverse transfer phase to match expert benchmark (14s vs ideal 8-10s)
